return(function(v,p,K,k,H,g,V,X,D,M,a,j,f,P,C,Z,s,l,O,o,i,B,d)i,X,D,l,f,Z,C,M,o,s,B,O,d,P,a,j=function(v,Q)local p=M(Q)local K=function(K,k,H,g,V)return B(v,{K;k;H;g;V},Q,p)end return K
